feedback_map.too_short: Your paragraph is too short. Try writing at least 3 sentences.
feedback_map.opinion_missing: Your paragraph does not clearly state your opinion.
feedback_map.no_explanation: You should explain your idea using words like 'because' or 'therefore'.
feedback_map.no_example: Try adding an example to support your idea.
feedback_map.positive: Good job! Your paragraph clearly presents and supports your opinion.
